title: Turkish Dill Sausage Wraps with Pickled Grilled Onions
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make Turkish-inspired dish featuring dill-infused robata sausage, pickled onions, and crispy grill bread.
instructions: 1. Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
2. Grill the sausage for 5-7 minutes per side, until browned and cooked through.
3. Meanwhile, grill the onions for 3-4 minutes per side, until caramelized and slightly charred.
4. Brush the bread with water and grill for 1-2 minutes per side, until crispy.
5. Slice the sausage and assemble the wraps with the grilled onions, pickles, and dill.
6. Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
